inputs.label: Area (m²)
inputs.businessContext: The area in square meters to convert.

businessContext_i18n.en: The area in square meters to convert.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor from m² to ft². 1 m² = 10.7639104 ft².

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard conversion factor from m² to ft². 1 m² = 10.7639104 ft².
businessContext_i18n.tr: m²'den ft²'ye standart dönüşüm faktörü. 1 m² = 10,7639104 ft².

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding the output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for rounding the output.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktının yuvarlanması için ondalık basamak sayısı.

inputs.label: Unit Price
inputs.businessContext: Optional: price per square foot for cost estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional: price per square foot for cost estimation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İsteğe bağlı: maliyet tahmini için fit kare başına fiyat.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Optional: percentage of additional area for material waste.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional: percentage of additional area for material waste.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İsteğe bağlı: malzeme israfı için ek alan yüzdesi.

inputs.label: Tolerance
inputs.businessContext: Measurement uncertainty percentage for tolerance band.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measurement uncertainty percentage for tolerance band.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tolerans bandı için ölçüm belirsizliği yüzdesi.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
